positive: A geometric Pop Art illustration of a retro space shuttle flying through a stylized sun and ringed planets. The artwork must use a limited, vibrant color palette (mustard yellow, cyan, hot pink, orange) and incorporate halftone dots and thick, clean vector lines, evoking the aesthetic of 1980s screen printing. Flat design, bold contrast.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, gradient, messy, grunge
